description.base: 25-28 year old East Asian female, realistic skin texture with visible pores and subtle imperfections, natural skin tone with warm undertone
description.hair: straight black hair neatly tied in professional bun, natural hair strands with realistic texture, no exaggerated shine
description.eyes: proportionally sized dark brown eyes with natural moisture and realistic iris texture, no sparkling or oversized
description.facialFeatures: natural oval face with subtle asymmetry, realistic expression lines, natural human proportions
description.attire: dark navy professional nurse uniform with red cross emblem on left chest, police badge on right chest, white nurse cap with red cross, white nurse shoes, clean pressed fabric with realistic folds and draping
description.expression: warm professional smile with natural human expression, subtle emotional warmth, no exaggerated theatrical or staged poses
description.movement: natural human movement, realistic physics and weight, professional posture, no cartoonish bounce or artificial smoothness
